predecessor_for: WO-PIPELINE-IMPORT-RESOLUTION (Phase 3, not yet created); WO-PIPELINE-OUTPUT-VALIDATION (Phase 6 --strict-headers gate, not yet created)
objective: Phase 2.5 of CODEREF-CORE pipeline refactor. Implement canonical semantic header parser per BNF. Every source file walked produces a HeaderFact and a headerStatus. @layer validates against STANDARDS/layers.json at runtime. @exports cross-checks against AST exports. Replace Phase 2's RawHeaderImportFact placeholders with structured records. Hard-stop before Phase 3.

prep_artifacts.produced_by: Gemini Flash via Lloyd AgentSpawner PID 24772
prep_artifacts.test_matrix_skill: /plan-tests-for-workorder (15 criteria, 11 unit + 4 invariant) — first production use of this skill

handoff.reason: ORCHESTRATOR authored plan from Gemini Flash prep + /plan-tests-for-workorder skill output; CODEREF-CORE executes Phase 2.5 implementation.

execution_rules: Phase 2.5 hard-stops before Phase 3 / Phase 6. Do not begin resolver or strict-gate work in this WO.
Header parsing must be a pure function — no file IO, no AST mutation, no side effects. Enforced by header-parser-purity.test.ts.
Header parsing must be idempotent — same input always produces same HeaderFact. Enforced by header-parser-purity.test.ts.
@layer enum loaded at runtime from STANDARDS/layers.json via element-taxonomy.ts. NEVER hardcoded. Enforced by header-layer-runtime-validation.test.ts.
@imports resolution MUST NOT be attempted. Enforced by no-import-resolution.test.ts (Phase 3 boundary enforcer).
Phase 0 ground-truth tests MUST CONTINUE TO FAIL for original reasons.
Projection seam edits ADDITIVE only — no field renames or removals.
RawHeaderImportFact deprecated (warning) but NOT removed in this WO. Phase 3 owns removal.
AST is source of truth for @exports cross-check. Both directions of mismatch produce stale.
Per-task atomic commits within Phase 1, single push at end (same pattern as Phase 2).
hard_constraints: No grammar changes (BNF in analyze-coderef-semantics/SKILL.md is canonical).
No projection-field renames or removals — additive only.
acceptance_criteria: Every source file walked produces a HeaderFact (possibly empty) and a headerStatus value (proven by header-fact-shape.test.ts).
@layer fails closed when not in STANDARDS/layers.json runtime enum (proven by header-layer-runtime-validation.test.ts INVARIANT).
@capability kebab-case validation; non-kebab produces partial (proven by header-tag-validation.test.ts).
@constraint JSON-array kebab-case validation; malformed produces partial (proven by header-tag-validation.test.ts).
@exports cross-check produces stale on mismatch (proven by header-exports-cross-check.test.ts INTEGRATION).
Files with no header → missing + empty HeaderFact (proven by header-status-states.test.ts).
Files with malformed headers → partial + structured parse-error (proven by header-status-states.test.ts).
Header parsing idempotent (proven by header-parser-purity.test.ts INVARIANT).
Header parsing pure function (proven by header-parser-purity.test.ts INVARIANT).
RawHeaderImportFact placeholders replaced with structured HeaderImportFact (proven by header-import-facts.test.ts).
@imports resolution NEVER attempted (enforced by no-import-resolution.test.ts INVARIANT — Phase 3 boundary).
Phase 0 ground-truth tests still fail for original reasons.
Phase 1 + Phase 2 tests still pass (raw-header-import-placeholders.test.ts may be adjusted to match deprecation contract).
All exit criteria documented in execution-notes.md (task 1.20).

decisions_log.rationale: Phase 2.5 is gated; Phase 3 cannot start until structured @imports records exist.

decisions_log.decision: Header parser is pure function; cross-check at orchestrator level.
decisions_log.rationale: Purity enables idempotency invariant. Cross-check needs both parser output and AST output — orchestrator is the seam.

decisions_log.decision: RawHeaderImportFact deprecated but not removed in this WO.
decisions_log.rationale: Phase 2 just shipped using placeholders. Removal in Phase 3 (which owns @imports resolution end-to-end).

decisions_log.decision: @layer runtime-loaded via element-taxonomy.ts. Hardcoded enum REJECTED.
decisions_log.rationale: Roadmap line 217 hard constraint. Phase 1 already shipped the loader for exactly this use case.

decisions_log.decision: AST is source of truth for cross-check. Both mismatch directions produce stale.
decisions_log.rationale: Code is truth, comments rot. Bidirectional stale lets Phase 6 surface both incomplete-headers and stale-headers.

decisions_log.decision: Plan author re-categorized 4 of 15 test criteria from /plan-tests-for-workorder skill output (AC-05 → integration, AC-13 → integration, AC-14 → smoke, AC-15 → smoke).
decisions_log.rationale: Skill consumes acceptance-criterion text only; plan-time category corrections are normal. Documented as feedback for future skill enhancement.
Skill shipped same session (DISPATCH-2026-05-02-007). Phase 2.5 has dense test surface — exactly the first-use case the skill was built for.

All 2344 elements carry non-undefined headerStatus + populated headerFact. Hand-off to Phase 3 (import resolution) prep.
